bio.name: Aryan
bio.summary: I am a AI engineer with 4 years of experience in AWS, Data Engineering and Machine Learning. I live in USA I am currently working at American Health Marketplace a as a Senior Software Engineer. Contact me on LinkedIn at aryandeore or Email as aryandeore.work@gmail.com.

projects.title: RAG Portfolio
projects.tagline: A portfolio website that showcases my projects and skills
projects.description: **What is it: ** This is a RAG application where users can ask questions about me, my projects, my skills, my experience, etc.
projects.problem: What problem does this solve? What gap does it fill?
projects.architecture:
**chunking**: Simple overlap-based splitting at 200-300 tokens per chunk with ~50 token overlap for context continuity

**embedding**: OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002 via LiteLLM, generating 1536-dimensional vectors for each chunk

**vector store**: Qdrant Cloud managed instance with 'portfolio' collection for semantic similarity search

**incremental embedding with chunk hashing**: SHA256 content hashing to detect unchanged chunks and skip re-embedding, reducing API costs

**schema being uploaded in qdrant**: Point structure with stable chunk ID (e.g., project123_chunk1), 1536-d vector, and payload containing project_id, section tags, and original text

**generation**: OpenAI GPT-3.5-turbo/GPT-4 via LiteLLM with max_tokens ~200-300, temperature 0.2-0.7, using retrieved context in assembled prompts

**query routing**: Based on query intent (e.g., 'about me', 'projects', 'skills', 'experience'), route to appropriate parent node and children chunks
projects.features: **Feature 1: ** This is a feature of the RAG application that allows users to ask questions about me, my projects, my skills, my experience, etc.
projects.challenges: **Challenge 1: ** This is a challenge of the RAG application that allows users to ask questions about me, my projects, my skills, my experience, etc.
